services.title: Mechanical Construction
services.desc: Complete industrial mechanical construction including fabrication, erection, installation, alignment, and commissioning of industrial equipment.

services.title: Structural Fabrication & Erection
services.desc: Design, fabrication, assembly, and erection of heavy industrial steel structures, process platforms, and support systems.

services.title: Industrial Piping
services.desc: Supply, fabrication, installation, hydro testing, pressure testing, and commissioning of MS, SS, CS, HDPE, and alloy process pipelines.

services.title: Plant Maintenance
services.desc: Preventive, shutdown, and corrective maintenance, mechanical overhauling, equipment servicing, and annual maintenance contracts.

services.title: Equipment Installation
services.desc: Installation of Pressure Vessels, Heat Exchangers, Boilers, Storage Tanks, Columns, Reactors, Rotating, and Static Equipment.

services.title: Shutdown Projects
services.desc: Turnkey shutdown planning and execution including certified manpower, piping, equipment replacement, and fast commissioning.

services.title: Civil Construction
services.desc: Industrial civil works including foundations, heavy equipment bases, industrial buildings, trenches, and drainage infrastructure.

services.title: Fire & Safety Solutions
services.desc: Fire protection system installation, industrial safety auditing, safety equipment supply, and HSE compliance support.

services.title: Industrial Manpower Supply
services.desc: Certified Engineers, Project Managers, Supervisors, Quality & Safety Officers, Fabricators, IBR Welders, Fitters, and Riggers.

services.title: General Industrial Supply
services.desc: High-grade industrial equipment, safety gear, project consumables, structural steel, and general engineering supplies.

projects.title: Petrochemical Plant Mechanical Execution
projects.desc: Turnkey mechanical construction, heavy equipment erection, and piping integration for major petrochemical expansion.

projects.title: Refinery Heavy Structural Fabrication
projects.desc: Design, shop fabrication, and high-altitude erection of 3,500 MT structural steel platforms and pipe racks.

projects.title: High-Pressure Alloy Process Piping
projects.desc: Supply, 100% NDT radio-tested welding, hydro-testing, and commissioning of alloy steel process lines.

projects.title: Steel Plant Turnkey Shutdown Maintenance
projects.desc: Overhaul of blast furnace components, pressure vessel inspection, and emergency pipe replacement within 12 days.

projects.title: Storage Tank Farm & Pressure Vessel Erection
projects.desc: Site fabrication and precision installation of heavy storage tanks, heat exchangers, and column reactors.

projects.title: Certified Manpower Deployment - Power Project
projects.desc: Deployment of 250+ certified IBR welders, pipe fitters, QA/QC inspectors, and safety supervisors for thermal power plant.

courses.title: Industrial Welding (MIG, TIG, Arc & 6G)
courses.desc: Master SMAW, GTAW, and GMAW welding techniques on plate and pipe in all positions including 6G under industry experts.

courses.title: Pipe Fitter & Isometric Blueprint Specialist
courses.desc: Isometric drawing interpretation, pipe template development, beveling, joint alignment, and precision fitting.

courses.title: Gas Cutting & Grinding Operator
courses.desc: Oxy-acetylene cutting torch handling, plasma cutting, structural edge preparation, and industrial grinding safety.

courses.title: Structural Steel Fabrication & Erection
courses.desc: Structural blueprint reading, beam & column layout, tack welding, truss assembly, and crane rigging alignment.

courses.title: Industrial Safety & HSE Compliance
courses.desc: Hazard identification, risk assessment, Permit to Work (PTW) protocols, gas testing, and industrial safety management.

courses.title: Mechanical Plant Maintenance & Overhauling
courses.desc: Overhauling of centrifugal pumps, valves, heat exchangers, mechanical seals, dynamic alignment, and preventive maintenance.
